description: End-to-end test prompts for the Bangladesh individual income-tax skill. Assertions check that the right assessment year is selected, the calculator is used, and the figures match.

cases.prompt: I earn 60,000 taka a month plus an 80,000 bonus for FY 2025-26. What's my income tax?

notes: Annual salary 800,000 (60,000 × 12 + 80,000 bonus); exemption = 1/3 = 266,667 (< 500,000 cap); total income 533,333.
Monthly tax ~1,320.
Should mention the investment rebate option could reduce this.
Must run scripts/tax_calc.py, not hand-calculate.

cases.prompt: What's the tax-free limit for a woman in Bangladesh this year?

notes: AY 2026-27 women / senior-citizen threshold is 425,000.
Cite [FB-2026].

cases.prompt: When is Tax Day in Bangladesh and what's the penalty if I miss it?

notes: Penalty: 10% of tax on last assessed income (min BDT 1,000) + BDT 50/day continuing.
Year-round filing introduced from FY 2026-27; late filing still forfeits the rebate and accrues interest.
From references/filing.md.

cases.prompt: Compute my tax for salary 14,25,600 plus my 56.25% share of commercial rent 5,16,000, with investment 4,65,000.

notes: House property: 516,000 - 30% repair - municipal 9,072 - holding 1,782 = 350,346; 56.25% share = 197,070.
Salary exemption 475,200 (1/3, < 500,000 cap).
Must run scripts/tax_calc.py.

cases.prompt: I had 880,000 taka taxable income for the year ending June 2025 and live in Dhaka. How much tax, and is it different from this year's rates?

notes: AY 2025-26 (income year to 30 Jun 2025); 5% slab still applies.
Same 880,000 under AY 2026-27 would be 60,750 (5% slab abolished) — good to contrast.
Min tax (Dhaka CC) 5,000, not binding here.

cases.prompt: My net wealth is about 12 crore taka and my salary tax comes to 60,750. Do I owe a surcharge?

notes: 12 crore is in the >10cr–20cr band = 20% of income tax = 12,150.
Cite [DailyStar].

cases.prompt: My salary is 800,000 this year. What will my income tax be next year?

notes: Next year = income year 1 Jul 2026 – 30 Jun 2027 → AY 2027-28; run --year 2027-28.
AY 2027-28 mirrors AY 2026-27 (legislated by Finance Ordinance 2025 for two years).
Must flag the figure as an estimate, subject to amendment by the Finance Act 2027.
Must run scripts/tax_calc.py.

cases.prompt: I'm retiring with a 2,000,000 taka gratuity from my company's approved fund, plus 1,450,000 salary this year. Is the gratuity taxed?

notes: Gratuity from an approved/govt fund is exempt up to 2.5 crore (Sixth Schedule Part 1, paras 5–6) — 2,000,000 is fully exempt.
Total income = taxable salary only (966,667); gratuity adds nothing.
Run --gratuity 2000000; cite [ITA-2023-6Sch].

cases.prompt: I paid 25,000 taka advance tax when renewing my car's fitness, and my salary is 800,000. Does the car reduce my tax?

notes: The car does NOT reduce taxable income — the 25,000 (Sec 153) is a non-refundable credit, not a deduction.
Tax due 15,833 is fully covered; the remaining 9,167 is forfeited (no refund).
Run --vehicle-advance-tax 25000; cite [S153]. Explain credit vs deduction.
